TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Clarence Brookins nalecuhan i American, nanu syubay kanas-mali miunduay nu Amilika NBA nisakaput, pahanhanan tu kawaw ayza. Clarence Brookins i 1968 a mihcan NBA sapapili' mimaliay a kawaw, saka 9 ku uwac atu silsil 118, namapili' tu nu Philadelphia 76ers putiput. bulad demiad, 1946 a mihca, Clarence Brookins, miunduay.
S.PHON: ¶r~…æar…ôn ¶…ô brookins nar~…æ…ô ¶uƒßan i am…ôri ¶an, nanu sjubaj kanas-mar~…æi miunduaj nu amir~…æika nba nisakaput, paƒßanƒßanan tu kawaw ajza. ¶r~…æar…ôn ¶…ô brookins i **** a miƒß ¶an nba sapapir~…æi î~ ° mimar~…æiaj a kawaw, saka * ku uwa ¶ atu sir~…æsir~…æ ***, namapir~…æi î~ ° tu nu pƒßir~…æad…ôr~…æpƒßia **…ôrs putiput. bur~…æad d…ômiad, **** a miƒß ¶a, ¶r~…æar…ôn ¶…ô brookins, miunduaj.
S.FORM: Clarence Brookins nalecuhan i American, nanu syubay kanas-mali miunduay nu Amilika NBA nisakaput, pahanhanan tu kawaw ayza. Clarence Brookins i 1968 a mihcan NBA sapapili' mimaliay a kawaw, saka 9 ku uwac atu silsil 118, namapili' tu nu Philadelphia 76ers putiput. bulad demiad, 1946 a mihca, Clarence Brookins, miunduay.
S.PHON: ¶r~…æar…ôn ¶…ô brookins nar~…æ…ô ¶uƒßan i am…ôri ¶an, nanu sjubaj kanas-mar~…æi miunduaj nu amir~…æika nba nisakaput, paƒßanƒßanan tu kawaw ajza. ¶r~…æar…ôn ¶…ô brookins i **** a miƒß ¶an nba sapapir~…æi î~ ° mimar~…æiaj a kawaw, saka * ku uwa ¶ atu sir~…æsir~…æ ***, namapir~…æi î~ ° tu nu pƒßir~…æad…ôr~…æpƒßia **…ôrs putiput. bur~…æad d…ômiad, **** a miƒß ¶a, ¶r~…æar…ôn ¶…ô brookins, miunduaj.
